system.flavor: You place a carefully crafted trap: flechette bomb, shard net, razor wire- the possibilities are endless.
system.effect:
Summon one or (5+) two death traps in free space in range. Traps arm at the end of your turn.

[Death Trap — Summon (1)]
Effect out a cross 1 area centered on the trap when it arms. When a foe starts their turn in the area, or voluntarily enters the area, it explodes for an area effect, dismissing it. Characters inside must save or take 4 damage, twice, or just once on a successful save.
